introSection: Dangai (Japanese: ダンガイ) was a steel stand-up roller coaster previously located at Odakyu Gotemba Family Land in Gotemba, Shizuoka, Japan. It is a customized Standing Coaster installation built by TOGO.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Dangai (Japanese: ダンガイ) was a steel stand-up roller coaster previously located at Odakyu Gotemba Family Land in Gotemba, Shizuoka, Japan. It is a customized Standing Coaster installation built by TOGO.



2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.
